case_title: TONG YET VS CAPITAL RESTAURANT EQUIPMENT CO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,368.00 FILED BY TONG YET AS TO DEFENDANT CAPITAL RESTAURANT EQUIPMENT CO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-1991 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TONG YET IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CAPITAL RESTAURANT EQUIPMENT CO OFF CALENDER SEE FILE FOR DETAILS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
